programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.sub_title: Best Of - Don't Judge A Pawn By Its
programs.desc: Will an 1842 Book of Mormon make Rick a believer? Will he wait for winter to come for a limited edition signed Game of Thrones, or be sucked in by P.T. Barnum's tell-all tale?

programs.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programs.desc: The Poseidon Crew hunt a remote mountain pass, a gold drought puts huge pressure on Jacqui and Andrew, Levi and Bridget are left to hunt alone, and the Ferals hunt in the extreme Pilbara region.

programs.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programs.desc: Donnie confronts poachers, who appear to be stealing gold from his lease, and a disaster dam-wall break threatens to end all hope of repaying their investor on time.

programs.title: Mountain Men
programs.desc: Tom is forced to contend against a potentially treacherous ice jam; Marty tries to come up with a last-ditch effort to get away from the Revelation Mountains; those in the Ruby Valley find themselves in the path of a dangerous predator.

programs.title: American Restoration
programs.desc: A 1940s Hi-Striker carnival game is dropped off for restoration. Can Rick and his guys ring the bell or will the crew strike out? Later, the guys hammer away at fixing up a rare, handmade nail gun from the 1800s.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: Kenny is feeling nostalgic in Koreatown, so he brings along an old friend, which may or may not have been a good idea. Brandi and Jarrod sweeten their profit in an unexpected way. Ivy tolerates the big city in an effort to find some name brand goodies.
